title: Jewelry Pliers Set - Needle Nose, Round Nose and Wire Cutters for Jewelry Making, Repair and Crafts
features: Jewelry Making Supplies: Package comes with set of 3 jewelry pliers including needle nose pliers, round nose pliers and wire cutters. Professional jewelry tools for jewelry making, jewelry repair, wire wrapping, beading and other DIY crafts

Premium Jewelry Making Tools: These jewelry making pliers are made of high-quality steel that are sturdy and rust proof for long time use. The jewelry plier with smooth polished surface and non-slip handles that are designed for jewelry making and repair. no worry about scratch or leave marks on your jewelry

Chain Nose Pliers for Jewelry Making: The chain nose pliers also called needle nose pliers or snipe nose pliers, are a great universal versatile plier that has long, tapering jaws without teeth that is smooth and pointed. They can reach into tight places that are inaccessible to other types of pliers. The needle nose pliers are perfect for gripping, bending, crimping, opening and closing jump rings, holding small items and shaping wire

Round Nose Pliers for Jewelry Making: The round jewelry pliers are a specialized plier characterized by their rounded, tapering jaws and most commonly used for forming loops in wire, this is especially handy when doing any wire wrapping and also for creating your own eye pins and jump rings

Jewelry Wire Cutters: The jewelry cutter pliers are ideal for cutting thin metal wire (up to 1 mm) or flexible jewelry string wire. The flat blades mean you can cut right up to the edge of your work and in hard to reach places minimizing filing and finishing needed
description: The Shynek jewelry making pliers set covers all basic functions for jewelry making, great jewelry making tools for jewelry starters. Our Strengths: Smooth & Clean Surface: The surface of our pliers is finely polished, and the surface is electroplated with a protective layer. Which makes them smooth and clean, and won't scratch or stain your jewelry. Perfectly Closed: The jaws of the pliers close seamlessly, making them ideal for small jewelry. Non-Slip Handle: The pliers handle is frosted to prevent sweating and slipping of hands, reducing human error. Needle Nose Pliers: Size: 5 inches Material: heavy duty steel metal Colors: blue non-slip handle Quantity: 1 pair Feature: rounded, tapering jaws Usage: for forming loops in wire, wire wrapping and creating eye pins Round Nose Pliers: Size: 5 inches Material: heavy duty steel metal Colors: purple non-slip handle Quantity: 1 pair Feature: long, tapering jaws without teeth that is smooth and pointed Usage: for gripping, bending, crimping, opening and closing jump rings, holding small items and shaping wire Side Cutter Pliers: Size: 4.5 inches Material: heavy duty steel metal Colors: pink non-slip handle Quantity: 1 pair Feature: flat and sharp blades Usage: for for cutting thin metal wire (up to 1mm) or flexible jewelry string wire Product Included: - 1 pair of chain nose pliers - 1 pair of round nose pliers - 1 pair of side cutter pliers
